series_metadata.series_description: Reports created by OBR that are neither mandated by law nor requested by an outside person or entity.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: If OBR perceives that report has lasting significance research/policy making capabilities of OBR, maintain such significance no longer exists ; Electronic: If OBR perceives that report has lasting significance research/policy making capabilities of OBR, maintain such significance no longer exists
